channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Trump suggests Panama Canal be returned to US control
item.description: President-elect Trump on Sunday again took on the matter of the Panama Canal, suggesting to a conference of his supporters that it be returned to U.S. control in a remarkable suggestion to push a sovereign country to cede territory.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, NewsNation

item.title: Rome's iconic Trevi Fountain reopens after renovation work in time for the Jubilee Holy Year
item.description: ROME (AP) — Rome’s iconic Trevi Fountain reopened Sunday after three months of renovations, just in time for the inauguration of the 2025 Jubilee Holy Year that is expected to draw millions of visitors.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Missouri company creates healthy dog treats using invasive fish
item.description: A Missouri has found a way to turn an invasive fish into multiple useful products, including a new line of dog treats.
item.dc:creator: Dillon Seckington, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Pickup truck driver killed by police after driving through Texas mall and injuring 5
item.description: KILLEEN, Texas (AP) — A pickup truck driver fleeing police careened through the doors of a JCPenney store in Texas and continued through a busy mall, injuring five people before he was fatally shot by officers, authorities said.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Louisiana often holds inmates past their release date, DOJ lawsuit claims
item.description: Louisiana’s prison system routinely holds people weeks and months after they have completed their sentences, the U.S. Department of Justice alleged in a lawsuit filed Friday.
item.dc:creator: KATE PAYNE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Fireworks, multiple knives, pepper spray found in woman's carry-on bag at LAX
item.description: The TSA described the discovery as "shocking," even to its most tenured LAX officer, and said it was a prime example of all the things not to bring when traveling through the nation's airports.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, Fox 5

item.title: Driver killed by police after driving truck through Texas mall, injuring 5
item.description: Authorities said the driver traveled "several hundred yards" through a JCPenney, injuring multiple people.
item.dc:creator: Abigail Jones, Fox 5

item.title: 2 Navy pilots shot down over Red Sea in apparent 'friendly fire' incident: US military
item.description: Two U.S. Navy pilots were shot down Sunday over the Red Sea in an apparent “friendly fire” incident, the U.S military said, marking the most serious incident to threaten troops in over a year of America targeting Yemen's Houthi rebels.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: 2 US Navy pilots shot down over Red Sea in apparent 'friendly fire' incident, US military says
item.description: DUBAI, United Arab Emirates (AP) — Two U.S. Navy pilots were shot down Sunday over the Red Sea in an apparent “friendly fire” incident, the U.S military said, marking the most serious incident to threaten troops in over a year of America targeting Yemen's Houthi rebels.
item.dc:creator: JON GAMBRELL, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: NORAD's Santa tracker was a Cold War morale boost. Now it attracts millions of kids
item.description: The Christmas tradition has become nearly global in scope: Children from around the world track Santa Claus as he sweeps across the earth, delivering presents and defying time.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Top-ranking NYPD officer abruptly resigns amid sexual misconduct allegations
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The highest-ranking uniformed officer in the New York Police Department has resigned amid allegations he demanded sex from a subordinate in exchange for opportunities to earn extra pay.
item.dc:creator: PHILIP MARCELO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: NJ rep. says it's alarming Feds can't bring down one drone
item.description: Chris Smith is disappointed by what he sees as a lack of transparency by the Biden administration over the New Jersey drone flap.
item.dc:creator: Safia Samee Ali, NewsNation

item.title: UPDATE: Missing 63-year-old man from Pueblo located
item.description: UPDATE: SATURDAY 12/21/2024 6:38 p.m. (PUEBLO, Colo.) — PPD reported that Palacio has been located and thanks the community for their help. ORIGINAL HEADLINE: PPD requests help finding missing 63-year-old man SATURDAY 12/21/2024 4:53 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Dara Korn, NewsNation

item.title: Blake Lively accuses 'It Ends With Us' director Justin Baldoni of harassment, smear campaign
item.description: In the complaint, Lively accuses Baldoni and the studio of embarking on a “multi-tiered plan” to damage her reputation following a meeting in which she and her husband Ryan Reynolds addressed “repeated sexual harassment and other disturbing behavior” by Baldoni and a producer on the movie.
item.dc:creator: Mallika Sen, KTLA 5

item.title: FDA: Contaminated cucumbers linked to 100 salmonella cases; Recall tied to Missouri and Illinois
item.description: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration reports that contaminated cucumbers are linked to 100 salmonella cases across 23 states, following a recall that included products sold in Missouri and Illinois.
item.dc:creator: Joey Schneider, NewsNation

item.title: NYPD's top cop resigns amid subordinate's bombshell sex harassment allegations
item.description: Jeffrey Maddrey, the NYPD’s highest-ranking uniformed police officer, resigned abruptly Friday amid bombshell allegations he demanded sexual favors from his subordinates in the force.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: It's eggnog season. The boozy beverage dates back to medieval England but remains a holiday hit
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — At Scoma’s Restaurant in San Francisco, this holiday season 's batch of eggnog began 11 months ago. The process typically starts in late January, just after the previous year's celebrations are over.
item.dc:creator: TERRY CHEA, STEPHEN SMITH and STEFANIE DAZIO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: What mayor Eric Adams told Luigi Mangione when they met in NYC
item.description: New York City Mayor Eric Adams said he “wanted to send a strong message” when he met Luigi Mangione on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Finn Hoogensen, NewsNation

item.title: What NYC Mayor Adams told Luigi Mangione when they met in NYC
item.description: New York City Mayor Eric Adams said he “wanted to send a strong message” when he met accused UnitedHealthcare CEO killer Luigi Mangione in New York City on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Finn Hoogensen, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Orphaned elk raised by Oregon cows accepted by local elk herd
item.description: An orphaned elk calf that turned up at a Pacific City ranch in March was recently accepted by a herd of elk after spending nearly nine months living with a herd of Angus beef cows.
item.dc:creator: John Ross Ferrara, NewsNation

item.title: Amazon workers continue strike four days from Christmas
item.description: Amazon workers at a Staten Island facility are just the latest to walk off the job during the final crucial days of the holiday season.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Here are the 34 Republicans that voted against the funding bill to avoid shutdown
item.description: More than 30 House Republicans voted against the government funding bill to avert a shutdown on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, Fox 5

item.title: 5 of the most frustrating health insurer tactics and why they exist
item.description: Even for those with health insurance, coverage does not ensure access to care, much less high-quality and affordable care.
item.dc:creator: Monica S. Aswani Assistant Professor of Health Services Administration, University of Alabama at Birmingham, KRON4

item.title: DC violent crime dips 35% in 2024, reaches 30-year low: US Attorney
item.description: Violent crime in Washington, D.C., has seen a 35% decline in 2024 compared to 2023, and violent crime in the district is now at a 30-year low.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Senate sends spending deal to Biden's desk, averting shutdown
item.description: The Senate in the early hours of Saturday passed a stopgap funding package, avoiding a government shutdown that would have furloughed hundreds of thousands of federal workers and bringing a tumultuous week in Congress to a close.
item.dc:creator: Al Weaver, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Senate passes bill to boost Social Security benefits for some
item.description: The Senate voted overwhelmingly in the early hours of Saturday to pass legislation to boost Social Security benefits for more than 2 million Americans.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Universities warn international students to come back to campus before Trump inauguration
item.description: Schools are also warning that international students should travel with additional documentation of their connection to their American college.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, KRON4

item.title: Report alleges Coast Guard leaders kept sexual assault investigation secret
item.description: HARTFORD, Conn. (AP) — Former top Coast Guard officials hid a yearslong investigation into sexual assault and harassment at the service's academy from both Congress and the public after leaders debated the fallout from a potential disclosure, according to a U.S.
item.dc:creator: DAVE COLLINS, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Over 600,000 Nuna Rava car seats recalled over possible crash failure
item.description: Nuna Baby Essentials is recalling more than 600,000 of its Rava line of car seats over a harness defect that could cause the restraint system to fail in a crash.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Tanner, KRON4

item.title: Traveling for the holidays? These are the busiest times to fly or drive
item.description: Drivers and airline passengers without reindeer and sleighs better make a dash for it: It's beginning to look like another record for holiday travel in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: David Koenig, WGN 9

item.title: Former top aide to New York City's mayor expected in court on criminal charges, AP sources say
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A former top aide to New York City Mayor Eric Adams is expected in court Thursday to face corruption charges in the latest blow to an administration beset by searches, resignations and the mayor's own indictment.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL R. SISAK, ANTHONY IZAGUIRRE and JAKE OFFENHARTZ, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Some elite US universities favor wealthy students in admissions decisions, lawsuit alleges
item.description: Children of the wealthy and connected get special admissions consideration at some elite U.S. universities, according to new filings in a class-action lawsuit originally brought against 17 schools.
item.dc:creator: BIANCA VÁZQUEZ TONESS and COLLIN BINKLEY, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Florida pursues charge against suspect in Trump assassination attempt for a crash after his arrest
item.description: TALLAHASSEE, Fla. (AP) — Florida authorities announced Wednesday that they're pursuing a criminal case against a man accused of trying to assassinate President-elect Donald Trump for a car crash that occurred after law enforcement stopped traffic to catch him.
item.dc:creator: KATE PAYNE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Scientists find 'forever chemicals' lurking in certain smartwatch wristbands
item.description: Prior research has shown that more than a fifth of Americans wear a smartwatch or a fitness tracker — and they do so for extended periods of time.
item.dc:creator: Sharon Udasin, ABC 4
